3_ingredient_price_history.answer: Old target (635a1189): UNTOUCHED. New target: INSERT or UPDATE for same invoice_id. Reconcile chain only on refreshExisting UPDATE or invoice delete — not on correction.

4_ingredients_current_price.answer: New target: updated IMMEDIATELY in persistOperationalIngredientCostFromInvoiceLine. Old target (635a1189): NEVER reverted by correction path.
4_ingredients_current_price.timing: immediate for new; never for old

5_supplier_intel_recalculated.answer: PARTIALLY — live scan (buildMatchedInvoiceProductsFromScan) stops attributing line to old ingredient after reject pair; DB history row for old ingredient still feeds history-based reads

6_oi_recalculated.answer: PARTIALLY — dispatchOperationalIngredientCostChanged fires for NEW ingredient only; OI inputs from raw price_history on 635a1189 unchanged; P0 guard blocks incompatible alert output

7_aliases_modified.answer: YES for new target — UPSERT Pepino→newIngredientId via upsertConfirmedAlias. NO delete/modify of old wrong link (none existed for bare Pepino on conserva). Jar aliases on conserva unchanged.

8_historical_pricing_chains_repaired.answer: NO — reconcileIngredientPriceHistoryChain not called on match correction

9_orphaned_records_left.answer: YES — poisoned history a689bd91 on 635a1189; possible dual invoice_id history if new row written; localStorage-only rejection

verdict.label: partially_reverses
verdict.summary: Correction changes forward-looking virtual match and writes new-target cost state, but does NOT delete, revert, or rebuild old-ingredient price_history or current_price. Pepino→conserva poison row a689bd91 persists.

scenario_B_no_match.label: does_not_reverse
scenario_B_no_match.note: No production handler; initial contamination fully persists

after_hypothetical_correction_to_new_id.rows_on_da472b7f: potentially 2 — a689bd91 (conserva orphan) + new row on new ingredient
